name: Fillet of Lamb with Herbs and Garlic
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each piece of lamb in half crosswise, then cut lengthwise but not all the way through. Lay flat like a book. For safe barbecue cooking, ensure each piece is no more than 2 cm thick. If thicker, gently pound between two pieces of clingfilm.
2. In a bowl, combine olive oil, thyme, rosemary, garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix well with the lamb. Cover and refrigerate for up to 48 hours, stirring occasionally.
3. Place the meat on the barbecue grate and cook for 4-5 minutes per side. Ensure it is fully cooked. Brush lightly with marinade during cooking.
